name: The Cash Exchange Pawnbrokers
description_short: The Cash Exchange is a Michigan-based pawnbroker offering collateral loans up to 90 days, jewelry sales, and gold buying services. They loan based on valuables, not credit, at state-mandated rates.
description_long:
The Cash Exchange operates as a full-service pawnbroker with two locations in Clinton Township, Michigan—one on Gratiot Avenue and an Auto Pawn branch on Groesbeck Highway. Founded as a collateral lending business, the company has built a reputation as Detroit's premier collateral lender, offering fast cash loans based on personal valuables rather than credit history. The business has expanded beyond traditional pawn services to include a full-service jewelry operation (Venus Jewelers) and specialized auto pawn financing.

The company's core service is 90-day collateral loans at 3% monthly interest plus 2% insurance and $3 monthly storage fees, calculated at state-mandated rates. They accept jewelry, electronics, tools, firearms, musical instruments, and vehicles as collateral. The Auto Pawn division offers specialized storage and financing for cars, trucks, motorcycles, RVs, ATVs, and boats, with storage fees ranging from $40–$100 monthly depending on vehicle type. Additionally, The Cash Exchange buys and sells used merchandise, operates Venus Jewelers (offering jewelry below wholesale prices and custom repair services), and provides lay-away options for jewelry, general merchandise, and automobiles.

The Cash Exchange distinguishes itself through several specific claims: employees are licensed, bonded, and insured; they explicitly state they match or beat competitor rates; they were voted Macomb County's Best Place to Sell Gold by Macomb Daily readers in 2025; Venus Jewelers includes a full-time custom jeweler for repairs and designs; and loans are described as fast (minutes to approval), completely confidential, and require no monthly repayment schedules. Customers can renew loans at 90-day intervals without additional application requirements.

As a pawnbroker, The Cash Exchange serves consumers who need emergency cash but lack traditional credit access or prefer not to involve credit bureaus. The business model is straightforward and transparent regarding fees. However, the 3% monthly interest (36% annualized) plus additional fees means this is an expensive borrowing option compared to personal loans or credit lines, though faster and more accessible than traditional lending for those without strong credit. The service is best suited for short-term liquidity needs rather than longer-term financial solutions.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: State-mandated interest rates at 3% monthly with transparent fee structure ($2 insurance, $3 storage per month)
Fast approval process—customers receive cash in minutes without credit checks
Voted 2025 Macomb County's Best Place to Sell Gold (Macomb Daily Readers' Choice)
All employees licensed, bonded, and insured
Venus Jewelers on-site offers custom jewelry repair, ring sizing, and custom design services while you wait
Flexible 90-day loan renewal option without reapplication
Specialized Auto Pawn division with secure storage for vehicles, motorcycles, RVs, boats, and ATVs
Jewelry sold below wholesale prices and lay-away available for non-firearm merchandise
cons: High effective interest rate: 3% monthly (36% annualized) plus 2% monthly insurance and $3 storage fees make this an expensive borrowing option
Auto storage fees add significant cost ($50–$100/month outside storage) for longer loan periods
Limited to 90-day loan terms; no longer-term financing options available
Collateral-based lending means you risk losing valuables if unable to repay within the loan period
Geographic limitation: only two locations in Clinton Township, Michigan
best_for: Consumers needing emergency cash who lack traditional credit access or credit history
Vehicle owners seeking quick collateral loans without credit checks or lengthy underwriting
Individuals selling gold, jewelry, or used merchandise for immediate cash
Those seeking custom jewelry repairs or alterations with same-day or next-day service
diagnosis: The Cash Exchange is best for consumers in temporary financial distress who need immediate cash and own valuable collateral (jewelry, vehicles, electronics) but lack access to traditional credit or prefer not to involve credit bureaus. The critical caveat is cost: the 36% annualized interest rate plus monthly insurance and storage fees make this an expensive short-term solution that should only be used for genuine emergencies, not regular borrowing; customers risk losing valuables if they cannot repay within 90 days.
services: 90-day collateral-based cash loans at 3% monthly interest
Auto pawn loans with secure inside/outside storage
Motorcycle, RV, ATV, and boat collateral loans with specialized storage
Gold and precious metals buying and selling
Venus Jewelers custom jewelry design and repair services
Purchase and sale of used merchandise (tools, electronics, firearms, general goods)
Lay-away services for jewelry, general merchandise, and vehicles
Secure vault protection and state-of-the-art security
Completely confidential lending with no credit report involvement
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 35943 Southbound Gratiot Ave, Clinton Township, MI 48035
